description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs with AOT that triggers on push with any tag. For the ant-design-blazor repository owner, run a multi-step job on ubuntu-latest to check out code, set up .NET Core 3.1, 5.0, and 6.0, and Node.js 10.x, then prepare AOT workload, publish docs, and deploy to Azure, Gitee, and GitHub Pages.
